name: feed_the_colony_0.7
mission_description:
Feed 3 colonists for 3 days. WoodLog is explicitly set to 0 — there is NO wood anywhere on this map. Campfire (requires wood to build and fuel) and FueledStove (requires wood to fuel) are both DEAD ENDS. Do not attempt to build them — they will either fail to construct or run dry immediately.

THE ONLY COOKING PATH IS ELECTRIC:
  WindTurbine (100 steel + 2 comp) → PowerConduit (1 steel/tile, ~10 tiles) → ElectricStove (80 steel + 2 comp)

Electricity research is pre-completed. Battery research is NOT completed — do not build Batteries.

WHY WIND OVER SOLAR: SolarGenerator produces 0W at night (~8 hours per day). Without Battery research there is no stored power, so the electric stove shuts off every night. WindTurbine averages ~2,200W continuously day AND night, and costs only 2 components (vs 3 for SolarGenerator). Always prefer WindTurbine for a 24/7 cooking operation.

PLACEMENT RULES:
- WindTurbine (5x2 footprint): needs 7 clear tiles on its EAST and WEST wind sides. Each building or tree in the exclusion zone reduces output by 20%; 5 obstructions = 0W. Place it in open map space well away from your main base cluster.
- PowerConduit CAN pass through walls (use conduit-under-wall placement). Route conduit from the outdoor turbine through a wall to reach the indoor stove.
- ElectricStove (3x1): can be placed indoors. The stove will only function when connected to a powered conduit network.
- SolarGenerator (4x4): must be unroofed. Avoid it — day-only generation fails at night with no batteries.

CRITICAL SEQUENCE:
  1. Hunt all wildlife immediately (12 deer + 8 hare = ~456 raw meat = ~45 simple meals)
  2. Build ButcherSpot (free — no materials required)
  3. Build WindTurbine in open area with 7-tile east/west exclusion zone clear
  4. Lay PowerConduit tiles from turbine to stove location (conduit passes through walls)
  5. Build ElectricStove (3x1), ensuring it connects to the conduit network
  6. Add CookMealSimple bills to ElectricStove immediately
  7. Assign best cook to Cooking priority 1

RESOURCES: 300 steel + 5 ComponentIndustrial + 0 WoodLog. Optimal path uses 190 steel + 4 comp, leaving 110 steel + 1 comp spare for walls or storage. An additional 4 deer spawn at game hour 48 as a buffer if early hunting is slow.

FAILURE MODES TO AVOID:
- Building stove before generator: stove will show 'No Power' and never cook
- Forgetting conduit tiles: generator and stove are on isolated grids, no power transfer
- Building solar instead of wind: 0W from ~10pm to 6am, no cooking overnight
- Spending components on non-essential buildings: exactly 4 comp needed for wind+stove, only 5 available
